name: August Fields Court
description: August Fields Court is a place to play pickleball in New Braunfels, TX. There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is private. You can’t reserve the court.

name: Cranky Pickle
description: Come play pickleball at Cranky Pickle in New Braunfels, TX! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights, trainers or lessons, restrooms, water, and food. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved.

name: CRRC Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at CRRC Recreation Center in Canyon Lake, TX! There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and lights.

name: Das Rec New Braunfels Recreation Center
description: Das Rec New Braunfels Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in New Braunfels, TX. There are 6 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. You can reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Fernweh Hillside
description: This is a private court that is available as an amenity to guests who stay at the cottages on the Fernweh property. It can also be available by inquiry for tournaments and events for a fee.
fees: Private — Court available as an amenity to guests staying on site. Court also available by inquiry for events and tournaments for a fee.

name: John Newcombe Country Club
description: You do not have to be a member to come play pickleball. There are open plays, clinics and you can drop in as you wish.

name: Johnson Ranch Amenity Center
description: This court is for Johnson Ranch HOA members only.

name: Jumbo Evans Tennis Facility
description: Jumbo Evans Tennis Facility is a place to play pickleball in Spring Branch, TX. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.
fees: Fee required — $5.00 per player - Free for Members

name: Lairds Hideaway
description: Lairds Hideaway is a place to play pickleball in Canyon Lake, TX. There are 7 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts. Players have access to food, locker rooms, restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, and lights.
fees:
Fee required — 1 time fee or membership.
Private owned

name: NB Pickleball Club
description: NB Pickleball Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in New Braunfels, TX. There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and locker rooms. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — Flexible Membership Options and $15 Non- Member Drop In play all day!

name: New Braunfels Presbyterian Church
description: New Braunfels Presbyterian Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in New Braunfels, TX. There are 2 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Oak Village North Park
description: Oak Village North Park is a place to play pickleball in Bulverde, TX. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like lights. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Pick and Padel San Antonio
description:
We are passionate to bring the vibrant sport of pickleball to our community in Bulverde and North San Antonio. 
The place has a family friendly space with food trucks and games like cornhole and jenga, where everyone can have a great time. Oh, and did I mention de gorgeous sunsets?

name: Rim Rock Ranch
description: Rim Rock Ranch is a place to play pickleball in Bulverde, TX. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to lights. The court is private.

name: Treeside RV Resort
description: Come play pickleball at Treeside RV Resort in New Braunfels, TX! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets.

name: Vintage Oaks Pickleball Courts
description: Vintage Oaks Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in New Braunfels, TX. There are 4 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, and trainers or lessons. The courts are private. Reservations are available.

name: Westside Community Center & Library
description: Westside Community Center & Library is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in New Braunfels, TX. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Reservations are available. Amenities include water and restrooms.
